data.name: Through the Wall
data.detailed_description:
Through the Wall is an addictive idle game where your goal is to fuck every girl through a wall! Progress by gathering coins, upgrading your click and passive powers, and unlocking new poses to enjoy with your girls. Watch as your efforts pay off, even when you’re not actively playing, with continuous growth and progress.

Features:

  • Idle Gameplay: Enjoy rewarding progress even while you’re away.

  • Simple Mechanics: Easy-to-learn gameplay with satisfying upgrades and rewards.

  • Incremental Progress: Unlock new rewards as you advance.

Perfect for players who love watching their efforts snowball into massive progress over time. Whether you’re actively doing it or letting the game run in the background, Through the Wall offers hours of casual, incremental fun!

-Not suitable for watching at work

-Not suitable for all ages

-All characters in the game are over 18 years old

data.short_description: Through the Wall is a idle game made in two weeks as a fun challenge to help a friend learn how to make a hentai game. The game is short and compact but it has some cool animations paired with some good SFXs.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or later
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 11 compatible GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX compatible sound card

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7 or later
  • Processor: Intel Core i3 or equivalent
  • Memory: 4 MB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 11 compatible GPU
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX compatible sound card
